figures.caption: Fig. 2: Training diagnostics for PPO. Reward and episode length are computed on a fixed evaluation environment; explained variance and entropy are logged during training.

Fig. 1: Training-and-deployment workflow. A map and minimum-curvature raceline are generated offline and used by the simulator environment and baseline Pure Pursuit controller during training. The PPO agent receives observations and reward from the environment and outputs a dynamic lookahead policy, which is then integrated with Pure Pursuit for simulation validation and real-world deployment on a 1:10-scale autonomous racing platform.
